message:
fix(core): LIKE/GLOB NULL semantics and type coercion in eval_join_expr and HAVING evaluator

eval_join_expr LIKE handler returned false (0) instead of NULL when either operand
was NULL, and only matched Text/Text pairs without coercing other types. Now returns
NULL for NULL operands and coerces non-text values to text (matching SQLite behavior
where `123 LIKE '123'` is true). Also added missing LIKE/GLOB arm in
evaluate_having_value which previously fell through to catch-all NULL.

7 regression tests: NULL operand/pattern/both, NOT LIKE NULL, integer coercion,
NULL in JOIN WHERE clause, HAVING LIKE filter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
